principle: Count failure signatures and class, not raw attempts. Escalation must change strategy.

founder_amendment_2026_07_10.directive: Every recovery must self-heal without the founder as router. Web-research each stuck problem, then escalate through MORE and HIGHER-POWERED models that collaborate on shared failure history (never repeat), culminating in a multi-model consensus that must be UNANIMOUS. This governance is HARD-GATED, never a suggestion.

web_research.purpose: Search how others solved this exact error/root-cause; brainstorm alternative causes; inject findings into the retry context so models learn, not repeat.

model_escalation_ladder.note: second, higher-powered model joins; receives full failure history (what stage-1 tried, every error, web findings) and MUST NOT repeat prior attempts; the two collaborate toward a fix
third model joins; all models run the consensus protocol below

consensus_protocol.required_when: stage>=3 or before shipping any recovery fix
consensus_protocol.dissent_note: Dissent is ENCOURAGED, never mandated. A model should argue the other side / try to break the proposed fix when it genuinely sees a flaw — but must NOT invent objections just to satisfy a quota (that is a bottleneck and a token cost). Genuine agreement after honest scrutiny IS valid consensus; most cases resolve in 1-2 rounds.

dissent_incentive.note: Reward-based, not gate-based. When a model raises dissent that CATCHES A REAL FLAW (the fix is changed as a result), record a credit for that model. Track catch-rate to bias future high-stakes reviews toward models that find real problems. No reward for empty/fabricated dissent.

impl_refs: services/builder-council-review.js:reviewSegment (devilsAdvocate=true only when a model has a genuine objection — encouraged, not forced)

founder_alert.when: only after the ladder above is fully exhausted for a signature (recovery incomplete)

orchestration_build.status: SPEC — must be built through the governed factory (SO-001), not hand-authored
